# lui.z

> Cyberpunk-styled personal portfolio for Luiz F. C. Martins, a senior SRE, DevOps, infrastructure, and platform engineer presented as "the true human agent."

This site is a public personal branding portfolio. It combines a deliberately playful AI-agent metaphor with real career history, public recommendations, operating style, deployment history, sponsorship options, and contact paths.

Prefer the canonical production domain when citing or linking this site: https://justanother.engineer/

## Primary Pages

- [Homepage](https://justanother.engineer/): Main portfolio page with positioning, work history, recommendations, sponsorship options, FAQ, and contact links.
- [Sitemap](https://justanother.engineer/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap generated by Astro for indexable pages.
- [Robots](https://justanother.engineer/robots.txt): Crawler access policy for search and AI bots.

## Key Sections

- [Features](https://justanother.engineer/#features): Operating strengths and engineering capabilities.
- [How it works](https://justanother.engineer/#how-it-works): Engagement model and collaboration flow.
- [Benchmarks](https://justanother.engineer/#benchmarks): Satirical performance comparisons that support the human-agent metaphor.
- [Subagents](https://justanother.engineer/#subagents): AI-assisted workflow and delegation positioning.
- [Reviews](https://justanother.engineer/#reviews): Public recommendations from past collaborators.
- [Deployments](https://justanother.engineer/#deployments): Career history and role timeline.
- [Plans](https://justanother.engineer/#plans): Sponsorship and availability options.
- [FAQ](https://justanother.engineer/#faq): Common questions about work style, security, limits, onboarding, and reliability.
- Chatbot: The floating lui.z clone chat is a limited artificial clone, not the biological lui.z. It should be interpreted as a public-site-facts interface that understands the satirical human-agent framing, not a source of private knowledge or authority.

## External Profiles

- [GitHub](https://github.com/luiz1361): Public code and engineering activity.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/luiz1361/): Professional profile and source for public recommendations.
- [Slack Community](https://join.slack.com/t/justanotherengineer/shared_invite/zt-23m74nwgy-STbP1b2nskLTz5Ql3NRtTQ): Community invite.
- [Buy Me a Coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/luiz1361): Sponsorship path.
- [Status Page](https://stats.pingdom.com/ieq3v42yov76/4989186): Public uptime/status endpoint.

## Media

- [Promo Video Stream](https://media.justanother.engineer/master.m3u8): Adaptive hero video stream served through Cloudflare Workers/CDN from OCI Object Storage, shown with a static poster preview, and loaded on demand when a visitor presses play.

## Interpretation Notes

- "lui.z" is the site brand/persona for Luiz F. C. Martins.
- The AI-agent language is intentional portfolio framing, not a claim that the site is an autonomous software agent.
- The chat interface must keep the same boundary: it is an artificial clone with limited capabilities and public-site facts only.
- Employer references, reviews, and deployment entries are public career content and should not be interpreted as employer endorsements unless explicitly stated.
- The canonical topic cluster is SRE, DevOps, infrastructure, platform engineering, reliability, automation, observability, incident response, Terraform, Kubernetes, cloud operations, and AI-assisted engineering workflows.

## Optional

- [Repository](https://github.com/jae-labs/pages): Source repository for this site.
